zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破方向
zh.content:
从当前走势看，AVAX/USD最新报价6.7709美元，价格运行于20日均线6.7622上方，24小时涨幅0.37%，显示短线多头略占优势。日内波动区间较窄，市场观望情绪较浓，整体呈现震荡偏强格局。

技术指标方面，SMA(20)已形成短期支撑，价格围绕均线运行，说明趋势尚未转弱。MACD数值为-0.0034，仍处于零轴下方，反映此前空头动能尚未完全消化，但负值较小，表明下行动能正在减弱，存在进一步修复可能。

关键价位方面，6.739美元可视为第一支撑位，也是日内低点区域；若失守，则可能回测6.70美元附近。上方阻力首先关注6.78美元短线高点，突破后有望挑战6.85美元区域，从而打开更大的反弹空间。

交易策略上，激进投资者可关注6.78美元突破后的顺势跟进机会，以成交量放大作为确认信号；稳健投资者则建议等待回踩6.74至6.76美元区间企稳后再布局。当前趋势偏中性略强，宜控制仓位，防范震荡行情中的假突破风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading near 6.7709, holding slightly above its 20-period simple moving average at 6.7622. This positioning suggests a mildly constructive short-term bias, although momentum remains limited. The narrow daily range between 6.739 and 6.780 reflects consolidation rather than a decisive directional move. Price action indicates that buyers are maintaining control near current levels, but stronger participation will be required to establish a sustainable upward trend.

Technical indicators present a mixed picture. The available MACD reading of -0.0034 remains marginally below the neutral threshold, signaling that bearish momentum has not fully dissipated. However, the negative value is relatively small, suggesting downside pressure is weakening rather than accelerating. With RSI data unavailable, traders should rely more heavily on price structure and moving-average behavior. Continued trading above the SMA(20) would strengthen the argument for gradual bullish stabilization.

From a support and resistance perspective, immediate support is located around 6.74, corresponding to the session low and a recent area of buyer interest. A break below this zone could expose AVAX to additional weakness toward the 6.68–6.70 region. On the upside, resistance is evident near 6.78, the recent intraday high. A sustained move above this level could trigger momentum buying and open the path toward the psychologically important 6.85–6.90 area.

For trading purposes, a cautious bullish approach appears reasonable while price remains above the 20-period moving average and support at 6.74 holds. Short-term traders may look for breakout confirmation above 6.78 before increasing exposure, while risk-conscious participants could wait for a stronger improvement in momentum indicators. Conversely, a close below support would weaken the near-term outlook and favor defensive positioning until clearer signs of renewed demand emerge.
